title: Structured Job Description Generator
scenario: Generate a structured job description in Markdown format for a software engineer position. The job description should include the job title, company name, location, job type, and key responsibilities. The output should be well-formatted and concise, within 200 words. The job description should also include a call to action at the end.
constraints: Must include a call to action

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated job description adheres to the constraints of word limit and call to action.
Check if the generated Markdown syntax is correct and follows standard best practices.
Check if the job description has a clear and organized structure, with headings and bullet points.
